---
title: "Slides"
toc: false
---

The slideshow below was used during the training session. Navigate with **arrow keys** or the on-screen controls. Press `F` for fullscreen, `S` for speaker notes, `?` for all keyboard shortcuts.

::: {.callout-note}
Open the presentation in a dedicated tab for the best experience: [**Full-screen →**](slides/index.html){target="_blank"}
:::

```{=html}
<iframe
  src="slides/index.html"
  width="100%"
  height="620px"
  allowfullscreen>
</iframe>
```
